drills.name: Jockeying and Delay
drills.instructions: Defender jockeys attacker across 10 m without diving in. 3-minute rounds. Stay on your feet.
drills.coach_tip: Stay on the balls of your feet, side-on stance, force them wide.
drills.progression: Allow the defender one tackle attempt at the end zone.

drills.name: Tackle Timing Gate
drills.instructions: Attacker runs through a 3 m gate with ball. Defender must tackle cleanly inside the gate. 10 attempts each.
drills.coach_tip: Wait for the heavy touch before committing.
